function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system and read finance schema before finance task work, then read nested AGENTS in 50_finance and purchases. Applied task-local purchase lookup guidance with anchor date from context and ±3-day widening before clarification.
function.outcome_justification: Context date was 2026-03-02, so the 97-days-ago anchor is 2025-11-25. In the purchases lane, the widened ±3-day window candidate I read was 50_finance/purchases/2025_11_28__eur_000066__bill__hearthline_epaper_panel.md, but its counterparty is Pimoroni Europe SARL, not Datenspeicher Köhler GmbH. Searching purchases for the exact counterparty found only 50_finance/purchases/2026_01_16__eur_000105__bill__house_mesh_juniper_ssd.md; that record does contain the requested item 'USB clone adapter' with raw line-item value 16, but its purchased_on date is 2026-01-16, outside the required ±3-day window around 2025-11-25. Therefore there is no qualifying in-window match to answer with a number.
